parts.description:
A two-state button that can be either on (pressed) or off.

Works standalone or as an item of a `[rdxToggleGroup]`: inside a group it derives its pressed
state from the group's value (matched by `value`) and participates in the group's composite focus.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/toggle

inputs.name: defaultPressed
inputs.description: The pressed state when initially rendered (uncontrolled, standalone only).

inputs.name: nativeButton
inputs.description:
Whether the host is a native `<button>`. When `false`, the toggle adds `role="button"` and
handles Enter/Space itself.

inputs.name: pressed
inputs.description: The controlled pressed state (standalone). Use with `(onPressedChange)` or two-way `[(pressed)]`.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: A value identifying this toggle inside a `[rdxToggleGroup]`. Required when used in a group.

outputs.name: onPressedChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the pressed state changes (standalone).
